insight: Python dataclass中使用了field(default_factory=...)但忘记导入field是常见错误。execution.py就是一个例子。审查plan时需要检查所有dataclass的import完整性。

If frontend/.env.local changes VITE_API_TARGET, an already-running Vite dev server keeps proxying to the old backend until it is restarted. In this repo that can surface as /api/accounts and /api/login 404s while legacy /api/config routes still work against the stale target.

In AppLayout column flex shells, a responsive header that is allowed to shrink can visually overlap the first page card even when media queries wrap correctly; pin the header with flex-shrink: 0 before chasing page-level layout bugs.
BUFF 登录抓取不能只把 session 和 csrf_token 存在当成已登录，必须再用 get_user_info 验证 cookie 代表真实登录身份；否则会把访客或失效态误报成抓取成功，并连带让自动同步展示误导性的失败结果。

Purchase Queue live BUFF buy can legitimately return BUFF_EXTERNAL_PAYMENT_REQUIRED with a bill_order_id; treat it as SUBMITTED/external confirmation, not FAILED. Pre-fix DRAFT batches may retain max_batch_value=500 and should not be armed.

Warehouse Storage Unit detail can be present while Inventory Table stays empty if sticky content filters such as status=unavailable remain in localStorage. Debug the Control Deck active/filtered split, localStorage filters, selectedItem fallback, and network together; reset content filters on storage scope changes so move-in/out selection rows remain visible.

In csgojiaoben, purchase account storage_refresh_token_configured only means a token env value exists; live warehouse batch can still fail at GC loggedOn. Probe Live GC before marking the first asset running, and label account tokens as saved rather than verified.

Warehouse live batch active job lookup returns 404 after a job reaches terminal state, so frontend route recovery must persist the submitted job_id per account and fetch job status by id before falling back to active lookup.

BUFF steam_trade receiver offers may return English title/text such as Receipt: Response to Steam offer and The seller has sent a offer while placing the received item under items_to_give; treat this as the known BUFF receive shape, not automatically unsafe.

When adding Steam mobile token support for UUYP automation in csgojiaoben, also review existing BUFF WebView paths that already return BUFF_WEBVIEW_MOBILE_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED; token support should close both paths unless explicitly scoped otherwise.
